allow: Bash(python -c "import fastapi, uvicorn; print\('serve deps OK', fastapi.__version__, uvicorn.__version__\)")
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 WEBUI_AUTH=false OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9000/v1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-fakedet WEBUI_NAME="FakeDet" open-webui serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8080)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 5944 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "8080 STILL bound by PID\(s\): " + \($p.OwningProcess -join ','\) } else { "8080 is FREE" })

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=5944" | Select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,Name,CommandLine | Format-List; "---- all python/open-webui ----"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "open.webui|open_webui|uvicorn" } | Select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,@{n='CL';e={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(110,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Auto -Wrap)

PowerShell(8081,8088,3000,7860 | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$_ : BUSY \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)\)" } else { "$_ : FREE" } })
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 WEBUI_AUTH=false OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9000/v1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-fakedet WEBUI_NAME="FakeDet" open-webui serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8088)

Bash(curl -s -m 30 -X POST http://localhost:9000/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"fakedet-v1.2","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"thời tiết Hà Nội hôm nay?"}]}' -w "\\n[HTTP %{http_code}]\\n")

Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 WEBUI_AUTH=false OPENAI_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9000/v1 OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-fakedet WEBUI_NAME="FakeDet" ENABLE_TITLE_GENERATION=false ENABLE_TAGS_GENERATION=false ENABLE_AUTOCOMPLETE_GENERATION=false ENABLE_FOLLOW_UP_GENERATION=false ENABLE_RETRIEVAL_QUERY_GENERATION=false ENABLE_SEARCH_QUERY_GENERATION=false open-webui serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8088)

PowerShell("== docker info =="; try { docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}} \({{.OperatingSystem}}\)' } catch { "Docker daemon UNREACHABLE - khởi động Docker Desktop trước" }; "== ports =="; 9000,8088 | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$_ : BUSY PID=$\($c.OwningProcess -join ','\)" } else { "$_ : FREE" } })

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 PYTHONUTF8=1 python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('d:/FakeImageDetector_v1/fakedet_vlm/run_backend_colab.ipynb','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); cells=nb['cells']; print\(f'valid ipynb, {len\(cells\)} cells, types:', [c[\\"cell_type\\"] for c in cells]\); print\('accelerator:', nb['metadata'].get\('accelerator'\),'gpuType:', nb['metadata'].get\('colab',{}\).get\('gpuType'\)\)")
